cleavage agent: The products of Sulfo-SMCC crosslinking reactions were digested by trypsin.
enrichment method: the complex was isolated by immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC)
instrument: injection onto a Linear Trap Quarupole (LTQ) Orbitrap XL
reduction reagent: the buffer used in SEC contained 5 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: the buffer used in SEC contained 5 mM TCEP
